uplink.description: nominal indoor reading (temperature, humidity and CO2 all present)
uplink._note: Oracle method: expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this synthetic in-bounds input and mapping Temperature->air.temperature, Humidity->air.relativeHumidity, CO2->air.co2 (ppm). Byte values mirror the upstream documented example.
Oracle method: expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this synthetic in-bounds input. Exercises a negative air.temperature.
Oracle method: expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this synthetic in-bounds input.
Oracle method: expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this synthetic in-bounds input. Exercises a CO2 value above 1000 ppm.

uplink.description: wrong payload length on fPort 2 (upstream returns null; we surface an error)
uplink._note: Oracle method: upstream returns { data: null } for any non-5-byte fPort 2 payload; the normalized codec reports this as an error instead of emitting a null measurement.

uplink.description: unsupported fPort (upstream returns null; we surface an error)
uplink._note: Oracle method: upstream only decodes fPort 2 and returns { data: null } otherwise; the normalized codec reports this as an error.
